RT @INNnerds: When data stories lack ledes, does that make them less journalistic?
Read @christinezhang's guest spot: https://t.co/jpRP82hj…

The mechanisms and skills needed to survive the New Times look nothing like the skills we needed for the Old Times, and vice versa, as the dying accumulate more and more to insulate their demise, the culture of value shifts beneath them, leaving them with nothing in the end.

Political affiliation matters much less than one’s dependence on the pre-pandemic Status Quo, all media has a strong status quo bias, all our rich and influential too, all of them terribly afraid we are shortly going to be remaking all of this again from scratch
The final vestiges of the status quo are going to claw and scream stronger and louder until we all are finally rebirthed into something almost unrecognizable, if we are lucky
